title: Clear Glass 1.21+
description: Clear Glass For Minecraft Vanilla [Continuity Mod recommended]
body:
## Clear Glass for Minecraft Vanilla, designed to keep the original look while improving clarity and consistency used with the Continuity Mod for seamless connected textures and a cleanerbuild and a nice look and heres another 2 images with the resource pack ![THE FIRST ONE IN ALL TYPES](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8clWpLpn/images/b429117f1c86cd5be297a05992982ebae22a1d80_350.webp)
## and ![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8clWpLpn/images/5743ab28d6ad3aff59aaf5fa1693bce9cbc2c3a2_350.webp)
 ## and now heres without the resource packs ![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8clWpLpn/images/e1b93ecc4e1dcf750028a440a0a87380951b8d9f_350.webp)
 ## and ![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8clWpLpn/images/9b2164c198644a0a6b5a6ce004769a3f54c1128e_350.webp)             **And Also Feel Free To Use This Pack In A Video Or Live And I Allow For You To Make A Video Saying This Resource Pack Isnt Great**
